ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "control_num" INTEGER /* Control number for the donor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the donor resides */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the donor */,
  "donor_code" TEXT /* Donor code or identifier */,
  "ic1" REAL /* Income category 1 */,
  "ic4" REAL /* Income category 4 */,
  "hvp1" INTEGER /* High-value potential 1 */,
  "ic5" INTEGER /* Income category 5 */,
  "pobc1" INTEGER /* Past online behavior count 1 */,
  "pobc2" INTEGER /* Past online behavior count 2 */,
  "ic2" REAL /* Income category 2 */,
  "ic3" REAL /* Income category 3 */,
  "avg_gift" REAL /* Average gift amount */,
  "target_d" INTEGER /* Target donation amount */,
  "tcodes" TEXT /* Target codes */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain or region */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the donor */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the donor */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the donor */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the donor */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the donor */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of last engagement with the donor */,
  "total_engagements" INTEGER /* Total number of engagements with the donor */,
  "average_engagement_rating" REAL /* Average engagement rating with the donor */,
  "communication_preferences" TEXT /* Communication preferences of the donor */,
  "donation_preferences" TEXT /* Donation preferences of the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donors_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation record */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of the donation (e.g., one-time, monthly, annual) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the donation */,
  "donation_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the donation was made */,
  "donation_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the donation */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation */,
  "donation_receipt_date" TEXT /* Date when the donation was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_history_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_history_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "campaign_goal" REAL /* Fundraising goal for the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget_allocation" REAL /* Budget allocation for the campaign */,
  "total_donations" REAL /* Total donations received for the campaign */,
  "total_donors" INTEGER /* Total number of donors for the campaign */,
  "campaign_roi" REAL /* Return on investment for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of the engagement (e.g., email, phone call, event attendance) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the engagement */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the engagement (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "engagement_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the engagement was made */,
  "engagement_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the engagement */,
  "engagement_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the engagement */,
  "engagement_follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_engagement_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_income_average" REAL /* Average income of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fundraiser, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Marketing, Development) */,
  "user_department_head" TEXT /* Department head for the user */,
  "user_team_members" TEXT /* Team members for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_management_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES states ("region")
)

CREATE TABLE "donor_segmentation" (
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segmentation record */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segmentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_segmentation_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id")
)
